common.metadata.title: Kimi K3 AI — Chat, Writing & API Playground | kimik3.net
common.metadata.description: kimik3 is an AI language generator for writing, chat, and content creation. Turn one prompt into articles, emails, code, and translations — powered by the kimik3 model.

landing.hero.headline: The headless engine for your next SaaS.
landing.hero.subheadline: Clear tutorials, API examples, pricing breakdown, and free tools (not affiliated with Moonshot AI)
landing.features.title: Everything you need to ship
landing.features.description: Pre-wired business logic so you can focus on building your product.
landing.features.auth.title: Authentication
landing.features.auth.description: Email/password, Google, and GitHub OAuth — ready out of the box with session management and account linking.
landing.features.payment.title: Payments
landing.features.payment.description: Stripe, PayPal, Alipay, WeChat Pay — checkout, subscriptions, webhooks, and order management.
landing.features.rbac.title: Roles & Permissions
landing.features.rbac.description: Fine-grained RBAC with wildcard matching. Full admin panel for managing users, roles, and permissions.
landing.features.i18n.title: Internationalization
landing.features.i18n.description: English and Chinese built-in with locale-aware routing. Easy to extend with additional languages.
landing.features.cms.title: Content Management
landing.features.cms.description: Categories and posts with full CRUD, status management, and admin panel — build your blog or docs.
landing.features.credits.title: Credit System
landing.features.credits.description: FIFO consumption, expiration, auto-grant on signup, and revocation — ready for usage-based billing.
landing.pricing.title: Simple, scalable pricing
landing.pricing.description: Start free. Upgrade when your team is ready to move faster.
landing.pricing.enterprise_desc: For teams that need scale and control.
landing.faq.title: Frequently asked questions
landing.faq.description: Everything you need to know about kimik3.
landing.faq.stack.question: Which AI model does kimik3 use?
landing.faq.stack.answer: kimik3 runs on the kimik3 model — a frontier model built for long-context reasoning, writing, and research. We continuously evaluate and add the best models available.
landing.faq.payment.question: How does pricing work?
landing.faq.payment.answer: Start free. Paid plans are billed monthly or yearly and unlock more credits and team features. Enterprise plans are customizable.
landing.faq.database.question: Is my data private and secure?
landing.faq.database.answer: Yes. Your conversations and files are encrypted at rest, we never train on your private content, and you can delete your data anytime.
landing.faq.customize.question: Can my team use it together?
landing.faq.customize.answer: Absolutely. Workspaces, roles, and shared spaces let your team collaborate from first idea to final review.
landing.faq.license.question: Can I cancel anytime?
landing.faq.license.answer: Yes — cancel anytime, no long-term commitment. You keep access until the end of your billing period.
landing.cta.headline: Start thinking with kimik3 today
landing.cta.subheadline: Join 100,000+ people using kimik3 to chat, research, and create. Free to start — no credit card required.
landing.footer.tagline: The AI workspace for thinking, building, and shipping — all in one place.

landing.meta.home_title: KimiK3 - Generate AI Images in 3 Minutes, Free Trial
landing.meta.home_description: KimiK3 AI image generator — create high-quality AI images in 3 minutes. Free trial, easy to use. Start creating today.
landing.about.title: What is kimik3?
landing.about.intro_1: kimik3 is an unofficial, independent guide to the Kimi K3 AI model — the open model from Moonshot AI with a 1-million-token context window. This site collects everything you need to use Kimi K3 well: plain-language tutorials, runnable API examples, an honest pricing breakdown, and free tools you can use without signing up. kimik3 is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Moonshot AI.
landing.about.intro_2: Whether you are evaluating Kimi K3 against Claude and GPT, wiring the Kimi K3 API into a product, or just curious what a 1-million-token context window is good for, the kimik3 guide walks you through it step by step — with code you can copy and numbers you can trust.
landing.about.items: What is Kimi K3?|||A clear overview of the Kimi K3 model: its open architecture, 1M-token context, strengths, and current limits.##kimik3 API tutorials|||Hands-on guides that call the Kimi K3 API from curl, Python, and TypeScript — copy a snippet, add your key, and run it in under a minute.##kimik3 pricing comparison|||Sourced Kimi K3 pricing side by side with Claude and GPT, including cached-input rates and context windows.##Free kimik3 tools|||An in-browser API playground, a downloadable prompt cheat sheet, and quick-reference tables — free, no account required.##Honest Kimi K3 benchmarks|||Where Kimi K3 wins, where Claude or GPT still lead, and how to choose the right model for each task.##kimik3 for developers|||Self-hosting notes, rate limits, and integration patterns for shipping Kimi K3 into real products.
landing.try.title: Send a real request to Kimi K3 — right here
landing.try.subtitle: No signup, no setup. Type a prompt and kimik3 sends it to the Kimi K3 model and shows the reply inline. This is the same endpoint our API playground uses.
landing.try.placeholder: Ask kimik3 anything — e.g. Explain a 1M-token context window in one paragraph…
landing.try.hint: Replies are generated by the Kimi K3 model and may be inaccurate. Verify important info.
landing.try.rate_error: Slow down — please wait a few seconds and try again.
landing.api_playground.title: Test the KimiK3 API in seconds
landing.api_playground.description: Send real requests from your browser, compare outputs side by side, and copy ready-to-use code snippets. Powered by Replicate.
playground.welcome.greeting: What would you like to test?
playground.welcome.subtitle: Pick a model, type a prompt, and see the request fly. This is a live UI preview — wiring it to the real KimiK3 API is next.
playground.examples: Summarize this article in 3 bullets|Write a SQL query to find top users|Explain gradient descent like I'm 5|Draft a launch tweet for KimiK3
playground.info.k3_notice: K3 is Kimi's most capable model — it consumes credits faster than K2.6.
playground.input.placeholder: Ask anything, or start an Agent task…
playground.disclaimer: UI preview — not yet wired to a live model. kimik3 can make mistakes; verify important info.
playground.model.title: Model
playground.shortcut_prompt.agent_swarm: Spin up an Agent swarm to:
playground.shortcut_prompt.slides: Generate a slide deck outline for:
playground.shortcut_prompt.websites: Describe a landing page to generate:
playground.reply.preview_prefix: UI preview — not connected to a live model yet. When wired up, this request would be sent to **{model}** ({effort}).
landing.compare.title: KimiK3 vs Claude vs GPT
landing.compare.description: Side-by-side API pricing, context window, and open-weight availability for the leading frontier models.
landing.compare.takeaway: Kimi K3 ($3 / $15 per MTok) undercuts the flagship Claude Opus 4.8 and GPT-5.5 — and it's the only one of the three shipping open weights.
landing.compare.sonnet_note: Claude Sonnet 5 is on introductory pricing through Aug 31, 2026; standard pricing of $3 / $15 per MTok applies from Sep 1, 2026.
landing.compare.disclaimer: Prices in USD per million tokens, as of July 2026. Not affiliated with Moonshot AI, Anthropic, or OpenAI. Prices change — always verify on the official pricing pages.
landing.cheat_sheet.title: The KimiK3 prompt cheat sheet
landing.cheat_sheet.description: A one-page PDF of high-signal prompts for everyday tasks. Leave your email and we'll send it the day it launches.
landing.logos.title: Trusted by fast-moving teams at
landing.assets.description: Every chat can become far more than an answer — kimik3 turns a single prompt into drafts, plans, code, and assets you can actually use.
landing.assets.items: Instant answers|Long-form articles|Email drafts|Social posts|Code snippets|Research briefs|Meeting summaries|Translations|Outlines & plans|Tables & data|Brainstorm lists|Product specs|Headlines & hooks|Follow-up emails|Slide talking points|Release notes
landing.start.title: Start with a single message
landing.start.description: No setup, no prompt engineering. Type what you need — kimik3 gets to work before you finish your coffee.
landing.start.placeholder: Summarize this PDF and draft a team update…
landing.start.examples: Summarize a document|Draft an email|Brainstorm names|Debug my code|Plan a project
landing.builtfor.title: Built for teams that think bigger
landing.builtfor.description: From early-stage founders to research labs, kimik3 is the shared brain your team reaches for first.
landing.builtfor.cards: Founders & product teams|||Validate ideas, draft specs, and ship faster with an AI partner in every decision.##Researchers & analysts|||Summarize sources, synthesize findings, and turn raw notes into shareable briefs.##Writers & content teams|||Go from blank page to polished draft in minutes — in your team’s voice.##Developers & engineers|||Explain, refactor, and scaffold code, then document it without breaking flow.
landing.builtfor.quote: We replaced four tools with kimik3. Our team drafts, researches, and ships from one place — it feels like we hired three more people.
landing.builtfor.quote_author: Dana R. — Head of Product, Northwind Labs
landing.stats.title: Modern teams run on kimik3
landing.stats.subtitle: From scrappy startups to global research groups — less busywork, more breakthroughs.

landing.vfeatures.title: AI that adapts to how you work
landing.vfeatures.description: kimik3 isn't a single chat box — it's a workspace that bends to your team's workflow.
landing.vfeatures.items: Workspaces that match how you think|||Organize chats, projects, and prompts into shared workspaces with the right context for every team.##Build a whole project from one prompt|||Turn a single message into a full draft, outline, or plan — then refine it conversation by conversation.##Memory & knowledge that follow you|||Upload files and let kimik3 search them by meaning, not keywords — your library becomes an instant answer engine.##Built for teams to think together|||Comments, roles, and shared spaces keep everyone aligned, from first idea to final review.

landing.vfeatures.mock_search_note: 3 results across 2 files — matched by meaning.
